settings.title:
Tell us what
you're looking for.
settings.sub: Custom builds, shade matching, service bookings, repair questions, retail inquiries — we read every message ourselves.

settings.heading: Response time
settings.body: Most messages answered within 24 hours, Tuesday through Saturday.

settings.title: Before you ask.
settings.intro: Quick answers to the questions we get most. Still need a hand? Send us a message above.

settings.question: How long does a custom preorder take?
settings.answer: Most builds ship within four to six weeks of deposit. Express slots are sometimes available — ask in your inquiry.

settings.question: What's the difference between Preorder and Ready-to-Ship?
settings.answer: Preorder units are built one at a time to your exact spec (texture, length, lace, color, density). Ready-to-Ship pieces are pre-built in our studio standards and leave within 48 hours.

settings.question: Do you offer shade matching from a photo?
settings.answer: Yes — send a well-lit photo and our colorists will match within 24 hours. No charge, no commitment.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: First-fit guarantee on every order. If the shade or fit isn't right, we'll swap it free within 14 days of delivery. Custom preorders are final but we'll work with you on adjustments.

settings.question: Can I have you build a unit from my own bundles?
settings.answer: Yes — the BYO Bundles service. You provide the hair, we'll handle cap construction, lace install, and styling. Quote on inquiry.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes. International express shipping is available at checkout. Customs and duties are the buyer's responsibility — most orders clear within 5-10 business days.
